description: Tuning boosts or analyzers against a single query by eye, regressing the broader query distribution.
body: Failure mode: a relevance change is made to fix one observed query and shipped without measuring others, so it improves that anecdote while quietly degrading nDCG across the real query mix. Detection signals: no judgment set or offline metric exists; tuning is justified by one example; user-reported relevance gets worse after a 'fix'. Do not tune ranking by single-query feel. Safer fallback: build a judgment set, compute nDCG/precision@k before and after, and keep only changes that improve the aggregate metric.
